children.children: 建议优先使用最近连接，右侧目录树支持双击或右键登录，系统会自动带出默认用户。
右键树节点可新增、编辑、删除、查看记录。
右键标签可水平/垂直分割并打开文件管理。
可切换项目和宽度，支持多文件分组查看。
暂无常用服务器，请先在左侧服务器列表登录后再返回此页。

style.boxShadow: ${(()=>{const n=recently_server_list.filter(item=>item.server_ip).findIndex(item=>item.server_id===row.server_id)+1;return n===1?'0 2px 7px -3px rgba(153, 27, 27, 0.85), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.22)':n===2?'0 2px 6px -3px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.72), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.24)':n===3?'0 2px 6px -3px rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.62), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.26)':n===4?'0 2px 5px -3px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.52), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3)':'0 2px 4px -3px rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.45), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.34)'})()}

/frontend/src/main.tsx.content:
import React from 'react'
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'
import App from './App'

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(<App />)

adapt.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const seen={};const list=src.filter(item=>{const k=String((item&&item.path)||'');if(!k){return false;}if(seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;});const keyword=(workspaceFileTreeKeyword||'').trim();const isDir=(item)=>item&&(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true);const normalize=(item)=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !isDir(item), key: item.file_id, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false });if(!keyword){return list.map(normalize);}const roots=[];const getOrCreate=(arr, keyPath, title, realPath, dir)=>{let node=arr.find(n=>n.key===keyPath);if(!node){node={key:keyPath,title,path:realPath,is_dir:dir?1:0,children:[],__lazy_loaded:true};arr.push(node);}return node;};const fileList=list.filter(item=>!isDir(item));for(const item of fileList){const fullPath=(item&&item.path)?String(item.path):'';if(!fullPath){continue;}const displayPath=(item&&item.path_display)?String(item.path_display):fullPath;const parts=displayPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);if(parts.length===0){continue;}let current=roots;let curDisplay='';for(let i=0;i<parts.length;i++){const seg=parts[i];curDisplay+='/'+seg;const last=i===parts.length-1;const node=getOrCreate(current, curDisplay, seg, last?fullPath:curDisplay, last?isDir(item):true);if(last){Object.assign(node, item, { key: item.file_id||curDisplay, title: item.name||seg, path: fullPath, path_display: displayPath, __lazy_loaded:true, children: isDir(item)?(Array.isArray(node.children)?node.children:[]):undefined, isLeaf: !isDir(item) });}if(!Array.isArray(node.children)){node.children=[];}current=node.children;} }const prune=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.filter(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){n.children=prune(n.children);}const dir=(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);return !dir || (Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0);});};const sortTree=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}nodes.sort((a,b)=>{const aDir=(a.is_dir==='1'||a.is_dir===1||a.is_dir===true);const bDir=(b.is_dir==='1'||b.is_dir===1||b.is_dir===true);if(aDir!==bDir){return aDir?-1:1;}return String(a.title||a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.title||b.name||''));});nodes.forEach(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){sortTree(n.children);}});return nodes;};return sortTree(prune(roots));})()}

action.description: 打开文件管理表单，设置store变量

adapt.workspaceTreeLazyChildren: ${(Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).map(item=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true), key: item.file_id, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false }))}

value.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const setChildren=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.map(n=>{if(!n){return n;}if(n.file_id===node.file_id){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: workspaceTreeLazyChildren||[], __lazy_loaded: true });}if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: setChildren(n.children) });}return n;});};return setChildren(Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[]);})()}

rightMenuAction.title: 确认提示
rightMenuAction.content: ${node.is_dir?'确认删除目录【'+(node.name||node.title)+'】吗？删除后将同时删除该目录下所有子目录和文件。':'确认删除文件【'+(node.name||node.title)+'】吗？'}

data.file_id_list: ${(()=>{const list=Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[];const targetId=node&&node.file_id;const findNode=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return null;}for(const n of nodes){if(n&&n.file_id===targetId){return n;}const c=findNode(n&&n.children);if(c){return c;}}return null;};const collect=(n)=>{if(!n){return [];}const ids=[n.file_id];const children=Array.isArray(n.children)?n.children:[];for(const child of children){ids.push(...collect(child));}return ids;};const target=findNode(list)||node;const ids=collect(target).filter(Boolean);return ids.length>0?ids:[targetId];})()}

adapt.workspaceFileMap: ${(()=>{const p=workspaceCurrentFilePath||workspaceActivePath||'';if(!p){return workspaceFileMap||{};}const info=(data&&typeof data==='object')?data:{};const content=(info.content_text===null||info.content_text===undefined)?'':String(info.content_text);return Object.assign({}, workspaceFileMap||{}, { [p]: Object.assign({}, (workspaceFileMap||{})[p]||{}, info, { content }) });})()}

value.workspaceTreeSelected: ${Object.assign({}, row, { path: row.file_path, title: row.file_name, is_dir: '0' })}

adapt.workspaceFileMap: ${(()=>{const p=workspaceCurrentFilePath||workspaceActivePath||'';if(!p){return workspaceFileMap||{};}const info=(data&&typeof data==='object')?data:{};const content=(info.content_text===null||info.content_text===undefined)?'':String(info.content_text);return Object.assign({}, workspaceFileMap||{}, { [p]: Object.assign({}, (workspaceFileMap||{})[p]||{}, info, { content }) });})()}

${(()=>{const p=workspaceCurrentFilePath||row.path||'';if(!p){return workspaceFileMap||{};}const info=(data&&typeof data==='object')?data:{};const content=(info.content_text===null||info.content_text===undefined)?'':String(info.content_text);return Object.assign({}, workspaceFileMap||{}, { [p]: Object.assign({}, (workspaceFileMap||{})[p]||{}, info, { content }) });})()}
